description: Motion is a creative analytics SaaS for paid social teams that combines ad creative with performance data to help users analyze what is working and generate new creative direction. It also offers competitor and brand ad research features under its Inspo product.
summary: Motion exposes a documented OAuth-authenticated MCP server at https://projects.motionapp.com/mcp for creative analytics and ad-library access; no public HTTP/GraphQL API or CLI was found.
